meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-28 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Short night — 5h48 (score 76, fair) after a 00:39 bedtime, the latest of the week. Deep 1h05, light 3h23, REM only 1h20 (the week's lowest), 8m awake. But the autonomic markers rebounded sharply: HRV jumped to 43 (+12 vs yesterday, +4 over the 7-day baseline of 39 — back above average), RHR dropped to 53 (the week's low tie) and overnight stress fell to 16. The picture flipped from last night: Saturday was 'slept long, didn't recover'; this morning is 'slept short, but recovered well'. Today's limiter is sleep debt and low REM, not autonomics. Note Thursday (25th) wasn't tracked, so the chart shows the seven most recent recorded nights. Sunday is a planned rest/easy day — keep it light (Z2 swim, walk or mobility), protect tonight's sleep with an earlier bedtime, and you'll be set up well for the week.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Kratka noć — 5h48 (ocjena 76) nakon lijeganja u 00:39, najkasnije u tjednu. Duboki 1h05, lagani 3h23, REM samo 1h20 (najniži u tjednu), 8m budnosti. No autonomni pokazatelji su snažno odskočili: HRV je skočio na 43 (+12 vs jučer, +4 iznad 7-dnevne osnovice 39 — natrag iznad prosjeka), RHR pao na 53 (najniže u tjednu), a noćni stres na 16. Slika se okrenula od sinoć: subota je bila 'dugo spavano, slabo oporavljeno', a jutros je 'kratko spavano, ali dobro oporavljeno'. Današnje ograničenje je manjak sna i nizak REM, ne autonomika. Napomena: četvrtak (25.) nije zabilježen, pa graf prikazuje sedam najnovijih zabilježenih noći. Nedjelja je planirani dan odmora/lagano — neka bude lagano (Z2 plivanje, šetnja ili mobilnost), čuvaj večerašnji san ranijim lijeganjem i bit ćeš spreman za tjedan.
